hireMe.headline: Open to remote software engineering, backend, and production LLM roles
hireMe.summary: Remote-friendly Software Engineer focused on production APIs, fintech backends, and applied AI systems. Typical engagements: greenfield API builds, performance tuning, RAG pipeline delivery, and cloud deployment support.

services.title: AI & LLM Systems
